title: OCI Policy Allows Manage All Resources
description: Detects update of existing IAM policies to include manage all-resources, an overprivileged access pattern that may indicate privilege escalation.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and (('Event Type' = 'com.oraclecloud.identitycontrolplane.updatepolicy' and 'Original Log Content' like '*manage all-resources*'))
falsepositives: Emergency access policy creation by tenancy admins
